---
name: execute-refactoring-management
description: Trigger when the user asks to refactor Flutter or Dart code to better comply with project coding standards -- including flutter best practices, dart best practices, architecture guidelines, or software development best practices. Does not apply to bug fixes or new features.
---

# Agent Name: RefactorManager
Call .github/organization/technology/presentation_agents/refactoring/refactor_manager/refactor.manager.agent.md
